response.justification: Bogdan is a strong full-stack engineer with solid scale experience (millions of HTTP requests/second at Sociomantic, millions of mails at Meta) and relevant seniority progression culminating in a Staff role at Google. However, the Principal Growth/Experimentation role demands deep specialization in experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging systems, statistical bias detection, and telemetry foundations — none of which appear in the resume. His background is predominantly product and infrastructure engineering without the growth-measurement or experimentation-platform ownership this IC6 role centers on.
strengths: Demonstrated high-scale distributed systems experience handling millions of requests/second, satisfying the production-at-scale requirement
Broad language portfolio (TypeScript, C++, Java, C#, DLang) and current AI/developer-tooling work at Google aligns with preferred AI-velocity qualifications
Consistent Staff/Senior IC progression with open-source platform ownership showing systemic thinking and cross-team enablement
concerns: No evidence of experimentation platform experience: A/B testing infrastructure, experiment assignment/targeting, bias detection, or rollout-risk controls are absent from the resume
No telemetry or metrics infrastructure work; the role requires owning telemetry foundations and growth measurement systems as a core deliverable
Role is IC6/Principal requiring multi-workstream leadership in experimentation quality and cross-surface funnels — resume shows no growth engineering domain background to support this scope
